UI_FastPack_RuntimeScope: Measures FastPack-compatible callbacks and deferred tasks. It does not measure the native loader or unregistered callbacks.
UI_FastPack_CompanionHint: Deep pre-launch diagnostics require the free Companion from GitHub.
UI_FastPack_NoCallbacks: No mods have registered profiled callbacks through FastPack.
UI_FastPack_NoTasks: No deferred task has completed yet.
